name: Boolean

values.name: and
values.comment:
Check if all values are true.

    -- and[n] a b ...
    -- a: a boolean value
    -- b: another boolean value
    and True True   == True
    and True False  == False
    and False True  == False
    and False False == False

    and False False == False

values.name: count
values.comment:
Count no. of true values.

    -- count[n] a b ...
    -- a: a boolean value
    -- b: another boolean value
    count True True   == 2
    count True False  == 1
    count False True  == 1
    count False False == 0

values.name: eq
values.comment:
Check if antecedent ⇔ consequent (a ⇔ b).

    -- eq a b
    -- a: antecedent
    -- b: consequent
    eq True True   == True
    eq False False == True
    eq True False  == False
    eq False True  == False

values.name: eqv
values.comment:
Check if antecedent ⇔ consequent (a ⇔ b).

    -- eqv a b
    -- a: antecedent
    -- b: consequent
    eqv True True   == True
    eqv False False == True
    eqv True False  == False
    eqv False True  == False

values.name: imp
values.comment:
Check if antecedent ⇒ consequent (a ⇒ b).

    -- imp a b
    -- a: antecedent
    -- b: consequent
    imp True True   == True
    imp False True  == True
    imp False False == True
    imp True False  == False

values.name: imply
values.comment:
Check if antecedent ⇒ consequent (a ⇒ b).

    -- imply a b
    -- a: antecedent
    -- b: consequent
    imply True True   == True
    imply False True  == True
    imply False False == True
    imply True False  == False

values.name: nand
values.comment:
Check if any value is false.

    -- nand[n] a b ...
    -- a: a boolean value
    -- b: another boolean value
    nand True False  == True
    nand False True  == True
    nand False False == True
    nand True True   == False

values.name: nand0
values.comment:
Check if any value is false.

    -- nand[n] a b ...
    -- a: a boolean value
    -- b: another boolean value
    nand True False  == True
    nand False True  == True
    nand False False == True
    nand True True   == False

    nand False False == True
    nand True True   == False

values.name: nimply
values.comment:
Check if antecedent ⇏ consequent (a ⇏ b).

    -- nimply a b
    -- a: antecedent
    -- b: consequent
    nimply True False  == True
    nimply True True   == False
    nimply False True  == False
    nimply False False == False

values.name: nor
values.comment:
Check if all values are false.

    -- nor[n] a b ...
    -- a: a boolean value
    -- b: another boolean value
    nor False False == True
    nor True True   == False
    nor True False  == False
    nor False True  == False

values.name: not
values.comment:
Check if value is false.

    -- not a
    -- a: a boolean value
    not False == True
    not True  == False

values.name: or
values.comment:
Check if any value is true.

    -- or[n] a b ...
    -- a: a boolean value
    -- b: another boolean value
    or True True   == True
    or True False  == True
    or False True  == True
    or False False == False

values.name: parse
values.comment:
Convert string to boolean.

    -- parse s
    -- s: a string
    parse "truthy"   == True
    parse "not off"  == True
    parse "not true" == False
    parse "inactive" == False

values.name: xnor
values.comment:
Check if even no. of values are true.

    -- xnor[n] a b ...
    -- a: a boolean value
    -- b: another boolean value
    xnor True True   == True
    xnor False False == True
    xnor True False  == False
    xnor False True  == False

Check if even no. of values are true.

values.name: xor
values.comment:
Check if odd no. of values are true.

    -- xor[n] a b ...
    -- a: a boolean value
    -- b: another boolean value
    xor True False  == True
    xor False True  == True
    xor True True   == False
    xor False False == False
